name: Violent Horror Stories: anthology
developer: Indikator, BOBER BROS, Alex Grim, M83 Galaxy, avoCATo, Trioskaz, thesecondleft, Max Specter
short_description: 4 short horror games from different authors and in different genres. Each game is an author's vision on the theme of 'pursuit'.
detailed_description:
"Violent Horror Stories: anthology" is an anthology of horror games from different authors. Each game represents the authors' take on the theme of "pursuit" with its own visual design, gameplay, and story. The average completion time for each game is 15-30 minutes.

GAMES IN THE ANTHOLOGY:
- "I ate old man's liver now this b***ch is mine" — a psychological arthouse horror about the loss of virginity.

- "No, i'm not a human i'm a ɿ̲̻ ʍ́ ρ̇̎Ծ̬͎Տ̯ͦ Ե̧͗_ͅ_̝̆ȝ̍ͯՐ͂͡" — an intimate story about a disaster and guests from underground. People are breaking into your home, but not all of them are true people.

- "Sensation" — become a reporter for Japanese television and do not lose your "Sensation," a famous actress who behaves extremely suspiciously. Discover her secret by finding necessary items on location and pressing them in time. Time slips away from you, just like the actress herself.

- "All along the toon tower" — a cartoonish cat in cyclical existential horror tries to escape using his wits and an axe.
